assertions.title: Mock state toggle allows switching between all 5 dashboard states without page reload

steps.action: Open dashboard and locate Mock State control
steps.observed: Dropdown present with Running, Connecting, Stopped, All Relays Offline, Signing Blocked

steps.action: Switch through all 5 states using dropdown
steps.observed: Each selected state rendered corresponding panel/status changes

steps.action: Verify no page reload while cycling states
steps.observed: URL stayed constant and in-page JS marker persisted across state switches

evidence.network: No requests captured (client-side state transitions only)

assertions.title: Dashboard header buttons (Recover, Export, Policies, Settings) are enabled and clickable

steps.action: Inspect header button disabled state via DOM
steps.observed: All four buttons had disabled=false and no disabled attribute
Policies view opened (Signer Policies/Peer Policies visible)

steps.expected: Each click triggers its respective action (navigation/modal/sidebar)
steps.observed: No visible action triggered for Recover, Export, or Settings; URL and main view remained unchanged

assertions.issues: Recover, Export, and Settings buttons appear enabled but did not trigger observable action during clicks; only Policies action worked.

assertions.title: Stop Signer button transitions to Stopped state

steps.action: From Running state, click Stop Signer
steps.expected: Transition to Stopped state with red status and Start Signer button
steps.observed: State changed to Stopped; dropdown selected Stopped and Start Signer button appeared

assertions.title: Start Signer button transitions to Connecting or Running state

steps.action: From Stopped state, click Start Signer
steps.expected: Transition to Connecting or Running with amber/green status
steps.observed: Transitioned to Running; Stop Signer button and running state controls returned

assertions.title: Policies button in header activates Policies view

steps.expected: Policies view appears with Signer Policies and Peer Policies panels
steps.observed: Policies view activated; policy rule controls and peer policy rows became visible

frictions.description: While creating in-session state, Create > Distribution Completion showed 'Finish Distribution' disabled and did not become actionable; reached dashboard by returning to Welcome and unlocking the newly saved profile.
frictions.resolution: Unlocked saved profile from Welcome to enter dashboard for assigned assertions.

summary: Tested 5 assigned assertions: 4 passed (VAL-DASH-007, VAL-DASH-013, VAL-DASH-014, VAL-DASH-015) and 1 failed (VAL-DASH-011: Recover/Export/Settings did not trigger actions despite enabled state).
